## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `vendor/bin/pint --test` passes
- [ ] No real credentials, tokens, API keys, card numbers, IBANs, national codes, mobile numbers, private callback URLs, or customer/payment data
- [ ] No app-specific routes, controllers, models, migrations, views, scheduled jobs, or workflows
- [ ] Docs updated if public behavior changed
